{{Quote|Ahhh, Lirondo, with friends like these, one need not be afraid his soul will go over to the dark side!|[[Jedi Lord|Lord]] [[Valenthyne Farfalla]]|<ref name="JS5">[[Jedi vs. Sith 5|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 5]]</ref>}}
'''Lirondo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Half-Bothan]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. He was the Chief [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] of Lord [[Valenthyne Farfalla]] during the [[New Sith Wars]].

==Biography==
[[File:Lirondo.jpg|thumb|left|120px|Lirondo at the [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan]].]]
Lirondo was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Half-Bothan]] who trained in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and became a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. During the [[New Sith Wars]], a conflict against the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]], Lirondo, along with other [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] who served under [[Valenthyne Farfalla]], joined the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] under Lord Hoth in [[1003 BBY]]. As Hoth and Farfalla recruited more than 300 members to join the Army of Light, Lirondo traveled with them for several [[Standard month/Legends|months]] until they arrived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]]. As the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] finally reached the planet, they discovered that the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] had established a blockade within the system.

During the [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan]], Lirondo defeated many enemies with his green-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and his battle-ax. Shortly after his master defeated the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Kopecz]], Lirondo fought against the Sith until [[Sith Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Skere Kaan]] activated the [[thought bomb]], a Sith technique that sought to wipe out all life on Ruusan.
